title: Twin temples

overview.short: Baidyapur Jora Deul is a 16th-century temple at Baidyapur in the Kalna II CD block in the Kalna subdivision of the Purba Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Twin temples?
faq.a: The best time to visit Twin temples is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Twin temples?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (65 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Twin temples?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Twin temples at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Twin temples?
faq.a: Stays in Twin temples start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Twin temples?
faq.a: The top attractions are Baidyapur, Roy-Jamna, Udaypur, Kalna, Piragram, Badla, Purba Bardhaman.
